indicators.name: brick walls
indicators.rationale: Brick walls are cold and rigid, providing no comfort or warmth for sleep.

indicators.name: ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: Bright ceiling lights are incompatible with sleep; they cannot be dimmed and disrupt circadian signaling.

indicators.name: glass windows
indicators.rationale: Glass windows allow light and sound to enter, disrupting sleep.

indicators.name: metal railings
indicators.rationale: Metal railings are hard and potentially slippery, not suitable for sleep.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: Open layout with no walls or doors provides no privacy or acoustic enclosure for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The brick walls, bright ceiling lights, glass windows, metal railings, and open layout all contribute to a hostile environment for sleep. The score is 3 because there are no positive indicators present.
